description_long: This is a pair of slip-joint pliers featuring two elongated, slightly curved handles coated in a red, rubberized material for improved grip and comfort. The jaws are robust and feature a serrated gripping surface, designed to hold, twist, or turn various objects securely. The pivot point is adjustable, allowing the user to change the jaw width for gripping objects of different sizes. The metal body is finished in a dark, likely corrosion-resistant coating, contrasting with the bright red handles. The tool is compact and sturdy, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or for general repairs in urban environments. No visible branding or logos are present on the tool.
description: A sturdy pair of slip-joint pliers with red rubber-coated handles and serrated metal jaws, designed for gripping and turning objects. The adjustable pivot allows for versatile use in urban repair and maintenance tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the pliers, highlighting the red handles and the profile of the serrated jaws.
description_view_1: Angled view emphasizing the curvature and separation of the handles, as well as the open position of the jaws.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the length and alignment of the handles and the jaw's gripping surface.
description_view_3: Front-angled view focusing on the open jaws and the textured gripping surfaces, with both handles visible.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, elongated handles with red rubberized, ergonomic coating for comfort and slip resistance.
attribute_jaw_design: Serrated, rounded jaws with a slip-joint mechanism for adjustable width; designed for gripping and turning objects of varying sizes.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Slip-joint pivot allowing for two jaw width settings, providing adjustable grip for different object sizes.
attribute_grip_pattern: Smooth rubberized coating on handles for enhanced grip; no visible ribbing or knurling.
